creator: cvs-src@yandex.ru
text:
Rename devel/py-zopetesting to devel/py-zope.testing for consistency with other zope ports. 

After repocopy will be finished, databases/zodb3 (the only consumer of devel/py-zopetesting) should be patched with patch attached.

I'd bump portrevision of zodb3 after all other repocopies will be finished (py-zopeevent and py-zopeproxy).

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
